verses.1: So these three men stopped answering Job, because he was righteous in his own eyes.
verses.2: This kindled the anger of Elihu son of Barachel the Buzite, of the family of Ram. He burned with anger against Job for justifying himself rather than God,
verses.3: and he burned with anger against Job’s three friends because they had failed to refute Job, and yet had condemned him.
verses.4: Now Elihu had waited to speak to Job because the others were older than he.
verses.5: But when he saw that the three men had no further reply, his anger was kindled.
verses.6: So Elihu son of Barachel the Buzite declared:
